title: Prevent editing applied database migrations
context: A migration already executed in staging was edited to fix a new requirement.
observation: The checksum diverged and deployment failed.
reusable_lesson: Treat applied migrations as immutable; create a new migration for subsequent changes.
recommended_procedure: Add a rollback or compensating migration.
Run migration tests against an upgraded database.
limits: May not apply before the migration has reached any shared environment.
